author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(imports): split out templating from ./utils (#5111)
body:
* fix(imports): split out templating from ./utils

This should fix https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/3632, as renderTemplate will no longer be in the imported path for connectors (react instantsearch hooks), and thus no errors can be in it either

* fix import in .d.ts

* increase bundle a little due to changes in ordering

fixes #5109
